patterns: rejects cross-tenant tenancy inserts through tenant_isolation WITH CHECK
filters auth.users through users_isolation and hides cross-tenant updates
limits non-owner reads to auth.current_tenant plus tenantless audit events
rejects inserts for another tenant under the non-owner application role
rejects storage file inserts when the provided tenant mismatches auth.current_tenant
applies tenant_scope RLS so a non-owner role sees only the current tenant files
proves flow routes require tenant-bound security
proves flow write routes expose idempotent tenant-scoped contracts
proves reference records routes require tenant-bound security
proves reference records source filters by tenant before returning rows
proves reference API protected routes require tenant-bound security
proves document storage routes keep tenant-scoped auth, rate limits, and audit hooks
